issues.message: V0-V1 travel in parallel Major 6th from beat 12 to 13 (2 transitions, strength 2.5 from the ratio table): the interval's implied fundamental is displaced from the lower note (ratio denominator has an odd factor), so the unvoiced root travels in parallel with the pair. Break the traveling fourth-class motion, or voice the root so the displacement is intentional.

V0-V2 travel in parallel Minor 3rd (+2 oct) from beat 20 to 22 (3 transitions, strength 3.7 from the ratio table): the interval's implied fundamental is displaced from the lower note (ratio denominator has an odd factor), so the unvoiced root travels in parallel with the pair. Break the traveling fourth-class motion, or voice the root so the displacement is intentional.

V0-V2 move in parallel Perfect 5th (+1 oct) from beat 59 to 60 (1 transition, strength 4.0 from the ratio table): a rooted interval, so common-fate motion merges the voices into one bass-rooted stream. Legitimate as a deliberate handoff or doubling; otherwise restore independence with contrary or oblique motion.
V1-V2 reaches perceptual complexity 77 at beat 34.5.
V1-V2 reaches perceptual complexity 77 at beat 42.5.
V0-V2 reaches perceptual complexity 38.5 at beat 49.5.
Adjacent voices V1-V2 are 20 semitones apart at beat 21.
Adjacent voices V0-V1 are 20 semitones apart at beat 46.
Adjacent voices V0-V1 are 21 semitones apart at beat 48.
Adjacent voices V0-V1 are 20 semitones apart at beat 53.

V0-V1 co-move in the same direction from beat 12 to 16 (5 co-movements, 4 locked steps): the voices share one directional predictor and collapse toward a single stream even without parallel perfects. Give one voice contrary or oblique cells, or make the doubling deliberate.

V0-V2 co-move in the same direction from beat 20 to 24 (5 co-movements, 3 locked steps): the voices share one directional predictor and collapse toward a single stream even without parallel perfects. Give one voice contrary or oblique cells, or make the doubling deliberate.

Voice pairs share one attack clock for 53% of their time (V0-V1 0.51, V0-V2 0.47, V1-V2 0.60): counter-lines are harmonizing rather than moving in independent rhythmic strata. Deliberate in homophony/chorale textures; in counterpoint, put the countersubject at a different rate (double-speed cells or augmentation) attacking in the other voice's gaps.
